patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because 'mapping' is null when 'toMap' is called on a CSVRecord created without headers. We need to handle the case where 'mapping' is null.
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
        if (mapping != null) {
            for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
                final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
                if (col < values.length) {
                    map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
                }
            }
        }
        return map;
    }

patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because 'mapping' is null when there is no header in the CSVRecord. We need to handle the case where 'mapping' is null to avoid this exception.
